Name: Acceleration
Effect: The user increases the Damage Base of all Priority Moves by +2.

Name: Atomize
Trigger: The user uses a Normal-Type damaging Move
Effect: The Move is changed to be Nuclear-Type.

Name: Bloodlust
Trigger: The user damages an opponent with aMelee Attack
Effect: The user gains a tick of temporary Hit Points.

Name: Chernobyl
Effect: The Weather changes to be Nuclear Fallout for 1 full round.

Name: Deep Freeze
Trigger: The user is hit with a Melee Attack
Effect: The attacking foe becomes Frozen. The foe is automatically cured of the Frozen Condition after 1 full round.

Name: Disenchant
Effect: The user is immune to Fairy-Type attacks. Defensive. Bonus: If the user is hit by a damaging Fairy-Type attack, the user of that attack loses 1 CS in the stat used to make that attack.

Name: Elementalist
Effect: The user gains STAB on Fire, Electric, and Water-Type Moves.

Name: Geiger Sense
Effect: This Pokémon has +2 Accuracy against Nuclear-Type Pokémon and Pokémon that have been hit with a Nuclear-Type attack since the start of this Pokémon’s last turn. This bonus does not work in Nuclear Fallout, or against Pokémon with the Lead Skin Ability.

Name: Infuriate
Trigger: The user is damaged by a Physical Move

Name: Lazy
Effect: When this Pokémon enters an encounter, it gains +5 DR but is Slowed. At the end of any of its turns, it may end this effect for the rest of the Scene, or until it returns to its Pokéball, as a Free Action.

Name: Lead Skin
Effect: The user is immune to Nuclear-Type attacks, and counts as a Steel-Type for the purposes of the Radiation Ability. Defensive. Bonus: The user is immune to being Poisoned or Badly Poisoned. Defensive.

Name: Petrify
Effect: Lower the target’s Speed 1 Combat Stage. You may target a specific foe only once per Scene with Petrify.

Name: Quick Charge
Effect: The user may take their turn at the top of the round. Priority, Interrupt, or Reaction Moves or Abilities cannot be declared in response to the user’s turn Bonus: The user’s Overland capability is increased by +2.

Name: Radioactive
Effect: When dealing damage with a damaging attack against a Pokémon that is neither Steel-type or Nuclear-type, this Pokémon does +X damage (before type-effectiveness). When dealing damage with a damaging attack  against a Pokémon that is Steel-type or Nuclear- type, this Pokémon does -X damage (before type- effectiveness).  When taking damage from a damaging attack that is not Nuclear-Type, this Pokémon takes +X damage (before type-effectiveness). This Pokémon does not take the extra damage while this Pokémon is in Nuclear Fallout. X is equal to half this Pokémon’s tick value (to a minimum of 1). When this Pokémon is using a Nuclear-type Move, X is instead equal to its tick value. This Ability may not be disabled, copied, or swapped away in any way.

Name: Rebuild
Effect: At the beginning of the user’s turn, if it has not been damaged or lost any Hit Points since the end of its last turn, it gains a tick of temporary hit points. Bonus: The user is immune to the damaging effects of Weather.

Name: Sharp Coral
Trigger: The user is hit by a damaging attack
Effect: The user gains -1 CS in the Defense hit by the attack. If this was in Defense, it gains +1 Attack CS. If this was in Special Defense, it gains +1 Special Attack CS.

Name: Sound Boost
Effect: The user increases the Damage Base of all Sonic Moves by +2.

Name: Stormbringer
Effect: The Weather changes to be a Thunderstorm for 1 full round.
